## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and project-agnostic.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior, or the reason they do not is explained.
- [ ] User-facing documentation matches the implementation.
- [ ] No credentials, private task content, or live coordination state are included.
- [ ] No unrelated cleanup is included.
